title: CP0 Comes to Egghead
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Jinbe, Robin as Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.
scene: Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's it. You just signed your own death warrant!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: So, you can use fishman karate too?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
